author: anon-a7c6025f
content: QA found 28 issues (7 HIGH, 10 MEDIUM, 11 LOW). Fixing all 28. Root causes: (1) autocast is decorative — guard returns nothing, no op dispatches to f16, (2) allocator memory leak from unrounded alloc_len, (3) backward refcount checks wrong Arc, (4) DDP has no timeouts and mismatched buffers, (5) TcpBackend panics for world_size>=3.
